description: Credit Karma is a consumer financial service from Intuit that provides credit scores, credit reports, and recommendations for financial products such as credit cards and loans. Its public website centers on consumer tools and educational content.
summary: Credit Karma exposes a known OAuth-protected MCP server at https://anthropic.mcp.creditkarma.com/mcp; no public developer HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found on creditkarma.com.
